ab: pitju a zikangan a ku sisagakkuan nu kadjamadjaman.
en: I arrived at school at seven today.

ab: kitului anga, semaumaqan a sinsi, qivu a pancang a mayatucu, “gacalji! kicungali!”
ch: 上課了，老師走進教室，班長說:「起立!敬禮!」
en: It’s time for class , the teacher walked into the classroom, and the monitor said: “Stand up! Salute!”

ab: nu kitulutulu amen, tuluan amen ni sinsi tua supu na kinacalisiyanan.
ch: 上課的時候，老師教我們數字的族語。
en: In class, the teacher taught us the paiwan language of numbers.

ab: kitjavililj amen a kitulu tjai sinsi, saka men a semenasenay anga tua senay nua semupu.
ch: 我們跟著老師唸，我們唱了數字歌。
en: We followed the teacher to read, we sang the number song.

ab: liyav anga ku kinacaqu a penaiwanan a kai.
en: I have learned many paiwan languages.

ab: djemedje aken a sema gakku, djemedje aken a kitulu tua pinaiwanan, uri ku sipaladenga tjai kina.
ch: 我天天上學，我天天學族語，我要講給媽媽聽。
en: I go to school every day, I learn the paiwan language every day, and I want to tell my mother.
